summary: Metrics exporter drops samples under load
description: Dashboards showed gaps during a traffic spike this morning. The exporter is designed to drop samples on a failed flush rather than backlog, but we saw drops even though the collector never returned an error.

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: src/metrics/exporter.ts posts the full drained batch in one request. During the spike, batches got large enough that the request itself timed out client side, which we count as a failed flush and drop the batch.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: makes sense, one big request instead of many small ones is going to hit that wall eventually

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: Mitigated for now by shortening the export interval so batches stay small. A proper fix would chunk large batches into multiple requests, filed as a follow-up feature. Resolving the incident.
